nasb.text: Judah was the father of Perez and Zerah by Tamar, Perez was the father of Hezron, and Hezron the father of Ram.

esv.text: and Judah the father of Perez and Zerah by Tamar, and Perez the father of Hezron, and Hezron the father of Ram,

cnv.text: 他瑪給猶大生了法勒斯和謝拉，法勒斯生希斯崙，希斯崙生亞蘭，

ccb.text: 犹大和她玛生法勒斯和谢拉， 法勒斯生希斯仑， 希斯仑生兰，

csbs.text: 犹大与塔玛尔生法勒斯和谢拉， 法勒斯生希斯仑， 希斯仑生亚兰，
